text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's about time to do this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've rewritten my program, so I don't expect we'll
see the same garbage output as before.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Forget expectations. I'd prefer you just think
about our next race. I've already calculated the
results.
